Description: This iconic view features Mount Fuji with its snow-capped peak and the Chureito Pagoda, framed by vibrant pink cherry blossoms. I choose it because of quintessential, globally recognized symbol of Japanese natural beauty and culture, especially during the spring season.

This is a picture of a traditional Korean pavilion/pagoda in a historical park, framed by brilliant red and orange autumn maple leaves. It is chosen for its breathtaking capture of traditional Asian architecture amidst the rich colors of the fall season.

This image shows a stunning evening view of Paris with the Eiffel Tower brightly illuminated beside the Seine River. The city lights and the colorful sky create a romantic and vibrant atmosphere. I chose this place because Paris is one of the most iconic travel destinations in the world and a city I’ve always wanted to explore.

This is an aerial, daytime view of the Houses of Parliament and the Elizabeth Tower (Big Ben) along the River Thames in London, showcasing the full complex and the surrounding urban area. It is chosen as a definitive symbol of British democracy, history, and architectural grandeur in bright daylight.

This is a picture of the Pyramids of Giza near Cairo. The photo captures the scale and ancient stone construction of the pyramid(s) against a clear blue sky. In the foreground, there are figures on camels, indicating a typical desert activity and providing a sense of scale. I chose this place because it is an unparalleled symbol of ancient civilization, engineering, and history, instantly recognizable worldwide.

This is a stunning aerial or high-vantage-point photo of the Manhattan skyline in New York City at sunset. The dense grid of skyscrapers fills the frame, with the sunlight bursting through clouds on the right, casting a warm, golden glow on the buildings. The Empire State Building is clearly visible in the center. I chose this place because it represents the raw energy and beautiful density of one of the world's most recognizable cities, captured during a time of day that maximizes visual drama.

This is a picture of the Great Wall of China, specifically showing its winding path along the mountainous ridges. The foreground features a well-preserved watchtower, with the wall extending far into the distance, connecting other towers on distant peaks. The wall is surrounded by thick, vibrant green foliage. I chose this place because it is one of the world's most impressive feats of human engineering and a profound symbol of Chinese history and culture.

This is a wide-angle photograph of the Prophet's Mosque (Al-Masjid an-Nabawi) in Medina, Saudi Arabia, captured at sunset, highlighting the many tall minarets and vast roof with its signature domes. I choose it for its immense spiritual significance as one of the holiest sites in Islam and its unique, tranquil architectural beauty.

The image captures a vibrant red mountain train climbing a steep, lush green slope with massive, snow-capped mountains in the background.I chose this place because it perfectly encapsulates the stunning beauty and dramatic scale of the Swiss Alps, combining technological marvel with natural splendor.

This is a picture of the Süleymaniye Mosque in Istanbul, Turkey, captured during the day.I chose this place because it showcases the immense historical architecture and the bustling, colorful environment of Istanbul.
